summary: Make rust-diffforge's Audio tab reflect the native recorder window's open state and suppress the false Windows Menu-key shortcut registration error.

review_items.summary: The Tauri host reports and emits audio recorder window visibility so the React shell can disable the Open recorder button while the recorder window is already visible.
The Audio tab renders an already-open recorder button as disabled with a clear Recorder open label until the native recorder window is hidden or closed.

On Windows, a bare Menu/ContextMenu hold-to-record binding is considered registered when the low-level Menu-key hook is the active capture path, preventing a false Unknown VKCode conflict message from being shown.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, hosted API, auth, billing, or cross-project contract change is required.

patches.summary: Expose the audio widget visibility event payload shape and register an audio_widget_status command.
Emit recorder visibility changes on show, hide, uninstall-hide, and native window destruction.
Treat the Windows bare Menu-key hook as a successful hold-to-record registration when global-shortcut cannot register ContextMenu.
Track audio recorder visibility in the main shell and pass it into the Audio tab.
Disable and relabel the recorder open button when the recorder window is already visible.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the desktop app. Existing recorder creation, microphone setup, provider selection, and shortcut customization remain available.

data_handling.sends_audio_to_remote_service: unchanged from the selected transcription provider behavior

tests.summary: Validate Tauri commands and audio host code.
